title: volvulus hantelmannii
intro: Volvulus hantelmannii, also known as the Hantelmann's twist or twisted wort, is a perennial plant species in the family Acanthaceae. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Volvulus hantelmannii include relief from muscle spasms, arthritis, and menstrual cramps, making it a popular remedy for women's health issues. Volvulus hantelmannii can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its therapeutic effects.
